children.name: div
children.textContent: Take the subway. Use the 72nd St covered exit to stay dry. Rain clears near your office by 1:05pm.

children.name: svg

children.name: div
children.textContent: Heavy rain & 22mph gusts forecast at E 86th & Park Ave at 2:30pm. Plan to leave 15 min early.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="19" height="19" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#F4A261" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-users" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M16 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><path d="M16 3.128a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.744"/><path d="M22 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: 14 users reported marble-sized hail at W 44th & 7th Ave. Avoiding that zone for 30 min.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="19" height="19" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#2DC653" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-sun" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><path d="M12 2v2"/><path d="M12 20v2"/><path d="m4.93 4.93 1.41 1.41"/><path d="m17.66 17.66 1.41 1.41"/><path d="M2 12h2"/><path d="M20 12h2"/><path d="m6.34 17.66-1.41 1.41"/><path d="m19.07 4.93-1.41 1.41"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Your neighborhood will be dry and comfortable. Ideal time for outdoor lunch or errands.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="19" height="19" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#2DC653" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-activity" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 12h-2.48a2 2 0 0 0-1.93 1.46l-2.35 8.36a.25.25 0 0 1-.48 0L9.24 2.18a.25.25 0 0 0-.48 0l-2.35 8.36A2 2 0 0 1 4.49 12H2"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Riverside Park: 58°, 5mph breeze, no rain until 9am. Your 6:30am run window is clear.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="19" height="19" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#F4A261" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-cloud-fog" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M4 14.899A7 7 0 1 1 15.71 8h1.79a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 2.5 8.242"/><path d="M16 17H7"/><path d="M17 21H9"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Visibility below 1/4 mile in your area. Allow extra travel time; cyclists should use lights.

children.name: div
children.textContent: 6 users report overflowing drain. Bike lane blocked; detour via Third Ave recommended.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Huge puddle blocking bike lane corner — bike through carefully

children.name: div
children.textContent: Strong gusts off the river, knocked over umbrella!

children.name: div
children.textContent: Totally dry under tree canopy, path looks clear
